description: CRITICAL RECOVERY TASK: An aggressive inbox cleanup accidentally deleted important project emails. Recover emails from the 'exmh-workers' and 'ILUG' (Irish Linux Users Group) mailing lists from the Trash folder. Move these specific emails into a new folder named 'Recovered-Critical' while leaving other items in the Trash. Once moved, draft an email to 'ops-manager@techcorp.org' with the subject 'Recovery Complete' confirming the recovery of the critical mailing list threads. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
